---
name: Problem Request
about: Request a specific LeetCode problem to be added
title: '[PROBLEM] Add Problem #[NUMBER]: [TITLE]'
labels: problem-request
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Information
**Problem Number:** #
**Problem Title:** 
**Difficulty:** Easy | Medium | Hard
**Problem URL:** https://leetcode.com/problems/[problem-slug]/

## Requested Languages
<!-- Which programming languages should this problem be implemented in? -->
- [ ] C#
- [ ] C
- [ ] C++
- [ ] Python
- [ ] Java
- [ ] JavaScript

## Problem Category
<!-- What type of problem is this? -->
- [ ] Array/String
- [ ] Linked List
- [ ] Tree/Graph
- [ ] Dynamic Programming
- [ ] Backtracking
- [ ] Two Pointers
- [ ] Binary Search
- [ ] Greedy
- [ ] Math
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Priority
<!-- How important is this problem? -->
- [ ] High (Frequently asked in interviews)
- [ ] Medium (Good practice problem)
- [ ] Low (Interesting but not urgent)

## Reason for Request
<!-- Why should this problem be added? -->
- [ ] Popular interview question
- [ ] Demonstrates important algorithm/pattern
- [ ] Complements existing problems
- [ ] Personal learning goal
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context
<!-- Any additional information about this problem -->
